mapper.insert: INSERT INTO h_holdings_snapshot ( portfolio_id, asset_id, snapshot_date, total_quantity, invested_amount, current_price, current_value, profit_loss, xirr, cagr ) VALUES ( #{portfolioId}, #{assetId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{totalQuantity}, #{investedAmount}, #{currentPrice}, #{currentValue}, #{profitLoss}, #{xirr}, #{cagr} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_quantity = VALUES(total_quantity), invested_amount = VALUES(invested_amount), current_price = VALUES(current_price), current_value = VALUES(current_value), profit_loss = VALUES(profit_loss), xirr = VALUES(xirr), cagr = VALUES(cagr)
